# Triaxial Mechanical Testing

**Summary**: A method to measure the elastic moduli and strength properties of rock samples under confining pressure.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-saleh|Saleh, 2016]] performed multi-stage triaxial mechanical testing on 70 core samples from Khuff A, B, and C.

## Key Results and Findings

- Determined average Young's modulus for Khuff C as 4,359 kpsi. ([[2016-saleh|Saleh, 2016, p. 77]])
